What We Do

Our Services

From a precise skin fade to a full relaxation massage — every service at Repère is delivered with technique, care, and a commitment to excellence.

01

Men's Haircut

A tailored cut for every face shape. Clean lines, sharp edges, precise finish — every time.

02

Skin Fade

From high to low — smooth, seamless gradient fades executed by skilled hands. A signature speciality.

03

Women's Haircut

We barb women too — precision cuts, trims and styling tailored to every woman's unique look.

04

Beard Grooming

Shape, trim, and define your beard with a hot towel treatment and premium products.

05

Kids Haircuts

Gentle, fun and precise cuts for the little gentlemen. Safe, clean, and comfortable environment.

01

Deep Cleansing Facial

Your skin collects dirt, oil and pollution every single day. Our deep cleansing facial removes all impurities from your pores, prevents breakouts and leaves your skin feeling genuinely clean — not just on the surface but deep within. Regular cleansing is the foundation of healthy skin.

02

Exfoliation Treatment

Dead skin cells build up on your face and make it look dull, rough and tired. Exfoliation removes that layer completely, revealing the fresh, bright skin underneath. It also boosts blood circulation, reduces dark spots and helps other skincare products absorb better into your skin.

03

Skin Hydration & Moisturizing

Dehydrated skin ages faster, cracks easily and looks dull. Our hydration treatment restores your skin's moisture balance, reduces fine lines and gives you a plump, healthy glow that lasts. Moisturized skin is protected skin — it's your body's first defense against the environment.

04

Eyebrow Threading & Shaping

Your eyebrows frame your entire face. Well-shaped brows instantly lift your features, make your eyes appear larger and give you a more polished, put-together appearance. Threading is more precise than waxing and gentler on the skin — no chemicals, just clean results.

05

Anti-Aging Face Treatment

Prevention is better than cure. Our anti-aging treatments stimulate collagen production, firm the skin and reduce the appearance of fine lines before they become wrinkles. Starting early means your skin stays youthful longer — it's an investment in how you look for the next 10 years.

01

Head Massage

Deep scalp stimulation that relaxes tension, boosts circulation and resets your mind.

02

Neck & Shoulder Massage

Release the knots built up from long days. A targeted, restorative treatment for upper body tension.

03

Relaxation Massage

A full-body relaxation experience to decompress, restore, and recharge from daily stress.

04

Ladies Massage

Dedicated relaxation and wellness massage sessions for women — gentle, professional and soothing.

01

Manicure

Complete hand and nail care — shaping, buffing, cuticle treatment and polish for clean, elegant hands.

02

Pedicure & Foot Care

Complete foot care — soak, scrub, nail trim and moisturize. Your feet deserve attention too.

03

Nail Art & Design

Creative nail art — from classic French tips to bold patterns and gel designs. Express your style.

04

Gel & Acrylic Nails

Long-lasting gel and acrylic nail extensions, shaped and finished to perfection.

Client Satisfaction
Our Story

More Than a Barbershop

Repère Barber Academia was built on a simple principle: every man deserves to look and feel his best. Situated at Carrefour Black Power, Grand Hangar — right beside Pafass University — we are Douala's premium destination for precision grooming and genuine relaxation.

The word Repère means "landmark" in French. That's exactly what we intend to be — a landmark of quality, consistency, and craftsmanship in a city that deserves nothing less. Whether you need a clean fade, a shaped beard, a head massage, or a pedicure, our trained barbers deliver with attention to every detail.

Repère.">We're not just cutting hair. We're crafting confidence — one appointment at a time. Welcome to the Academy. Welcome to Repère.

Book Your Session
Why Repère

The Difference

Professional Barbers

Trained, experienced barbers who master their craft and stay updated with modern trends.

Clean Environment

Sterilized tools, fresh capes for every client, and a spotless lounge — hygiene is non-negotiable.

Modern Equipment

Premium clippers, trimmers and grooming products. The right tools make the difference.

Affordable Prices

Luxury quality doesn't have to mean luxury prices. We keep our rates fair and accessible.

Friendly Service

A welcoming vibe, a listening ear, and genuine care. Every client is treated like family.
